description_long: This object consists of two tall, cylindrical bottles with rounded shoulders and a slight taper toward the top, each fitted with a spray nozzle and a removable cap. The bottles are primarily white with subtle geometric patterns and green accents, and one features a prominent blue IBSA logo. The front-facing bottle displays a partial cutaway, revealing the internal spray mechanism and tube. The rear and side views show extensive printed text, likely product information and instructions, in fine gray lettering. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a clean, clinical aesthetic typical of personal care products. The bottles appear to be made of lightweight metal or plastic, suitable for containing liquid shampoo under pressure.
description: Two tall, white cylindrical bottles with spray nozzles, geometric patterns, and a blue IBSA logo, featuring a modern, clean design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both bottles, one with a cutaway revealing the internal spray tube and the blue IBSA logo.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the extensive printed text and the back of the spray nozzles.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the full height of the bottles, the geometric pattern, and more of the label text.
description_view_3: Oblique front view focusing on the rounded shoulders and the arrangement of the two bottles together.
